tiers.name: Agency Starter Pack
tiers.tagline: Everything you need to launch your AI service offering this week.
included_files: service-menu.json — 10 AI services with full descriptions, ideal clients, deliverables, pricing, and scoping guidance
pricing-methodology.json — 2,400-word guide covering value anchoring, packaging, and objection-handling for price pushback
Discovery Call Script (included in delivery-framework.json Phase 1)
proposals/ai-content-strategy.json — 2 proposal templates
proposals/ai-customer-service.json — 2 proposal templates
proposals/ai-workflow-automation.json — 2 proposal templates (partial)
proposals/ai-sales-automation.json — 1 proposal template
proposals/fractional-ai-officer.json — 1 proposal template
tiers.summary: The Starter Pack gives you the service menu to know what to sell, the pricing methodology to know what to charge, and 5 real proposal templates to start sending immediately.

tiers.name: Agency Pro
tiers.tagline: Add delivery systems, onboarding, and 20 more proposal templates.
included_files: Everything in Starter Pack
delivery-framework.json — Full 6-phase client delivery framework with QA checkpoints
All remaining proposal templates (20 additional across all 10 services)
objections.json — 30 objections with scripted responses
AI Project Kickoff Deck template (provided as structured content)
Scope creep prevention playbook (included in delivery-framework.json)
Client onboarding email sequence (5-email sequence provided as text)
tiers.summary: Pro adds the operational layer: how to deliver what you sell, how to handle scope changes, how to onboard clients, and 20 more proposal templates covering every service in the menu.

tiers.name: Agency OS Complete
tiers.tagline: The full operating system: everything in Pro plus calculator, case study templates, team training, and tool stack.
included_files: Everything in Pro
pricing-calculator/ — Interactive Next.js pricing calculator web app
10 case study templates (structured formats for different service types)
Team training framework (how to train employees to deliver AI services)
Agency AI Stack recommendations (curated tool recommendations by service type)
Client success metrics template (what to track and report for each service)
tiers.summary: The Complete tier is the full operating system — from pricing and proposals to delivery, team training, and measurement. Everything a serious AI agency needs in one place.
